ticket_title: Positive, negative and screenshot proof for Evidence and Document Sufficiency Lifecycle

scope.validated_contract: Evidence and Document Sufficiency Lifecycle process-first implementation slice

dependencies_satisfied_by_commits.summary: P0 process coverage matrix statuses updated

product_delta_in_qa_slice.delta: Restored exact internal checksum proof copy in the upload latest card.
Removed duplicate visible file-name headings from S029 review detail while keeping the selected-upload context.
Restored the review boundary text `Visibility: Redacted` so sufficiency acceptance remains visibly non-client-release.

validation_commands.command: PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3080 pnpm playwright test tests/route-smoke.spec.ts --grep "registered route smoke.*(027|028|029|030|046|047)|UX-DETAIL-001 /evidence/demo/review|UX-PAGE-SPLIT-002 /documents/review-queue|UX-CTA evidence upload and review chain" --workers=1

PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3081 pnpm playwright test tests/document-upload-api.spec.ts tests/evidence-review-api.spec.ts tests/document-upload-lifecycle-hardening.spec.ts tests/p0-process-coverage-matrix-qa.spec.ts --workers=1

positive_path_proof.evidence: Upload picker stores a file, survives reload, and shows checksum proof as internal.
Scoped evidence acceptance reaches sufficient lifecycle while export, release and client visibility stay locked/redacted.
Multipart upload creates document bytes, version proof, extraction, evidence and audit rows.
Compliance can accept reviewed scoped evidence without releasing client visibility.

negative_path_proof.evidence: Upload mutation fails closed when required audit persistence is unavailable.
Unsupported file types are rejected without creating document rows.
Roles outside the upload demo policy are denied and audited.
Evidence review mutation fails closed when audit persistence is unavailable.
Analyst evidence sufficiency acceptance is denied and upload-created evidence remains insufficient.
Wrong-scope sufficiency acceptance does not mutate document or evidence state.
Runtime attributes and lifecycle copy preserve no-release/no-export/no-client-advice boundaries.

screenshot_proof.assertion: Area entry fits without vertical scrolling and exposes one primary workbench orientation.
Upload step is compact and keeps review/release boundaries separate.
Review queue/detail structure is compact and gate-oriented.
Verification detail uses compact process cards instead of a long duplicate proof page.
Proof boundary is available as a concise gate without client-visible payload exposure.

external_broad_grep_failures.command: PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=3074 pnpm playwright test tests/evidence-lifecycle-contract.spec.ts tests/route-smoke.spec.ts --grep "EPIC-08|027|028|029|030|046|047|documents|evidence" --workers=1
external_broad_grep_failures.reason: The broad grep included older phase routes and expectations outside the EPIC-08 target-route acceptance set. A tighter EPIC-08 target-route smoke passed 9/9.

mission_card.mission: Prove EPIC-08 as a bounded process-first evidence/document lifecycle implementation slice without overclaiming full DOMAIN-C completion.
success_criteria: Visual proof shows no long-page regression on target surfaces
Coverage matrix blocks completion claims where proof remains partial

facts: All EPIC-08 implementation subtasks A-D have committed proof.
Targeted QA commands passed after restoring the redacted visibility signal.
DOMAIN-C closure remains blocked in the P0 matrix.
assumptions: Existing screenshots from EPIC-08 implementation commits remain valid because the QA fix changed copy and duplicate headings, not the target layout geometry.
gaps: Full DOMAIN-C closure is intentionally not claimed because matrix implemented_step_count remains zero.

reframing_matrix.decision: Reject UI-only completion and require API/service/negative proof.
Use concise proof boundaries instead of hiding audit state.
Keep sufficiency acceptance visibly redacted and non-client-visible.
Accept EPIC-08 slice proof while blocking full DOMAIN-C closure.

triz_contradictions.contradiction: The page must be shorter without removing safety proof.
triz_contradictions.resolution: Move proof into compact boundary summaries/drawers and test fail-closed markers.

triz_contradictions.contradiction: A document can become sufficient without becoming client-visible.
triz_contradictions.resolution: Expose `Visibility: Redacted` and keep release/export locks in tests.

triz_contradictions.contradiction: The epic needs acceptance while the domain remains incomplete.
triz_contradictions.resolution: Record slice proof separately from matrix closure.

sit_closed_world_moves: Reuse existing document upload API instead of creating a parallel upload path.
Reuse S027-S030 route registry IDs instead of adding new routes.
Reuse existing Playwright suites as executable proof.
Reuse P0 coverage matrix as no-overclaim gate.
Reuse shared cards/workbench primitives instead of one-off proof panels.

scamper.substitute: Replace filename headings in repeated review areas with `Selected upload` to avoid duplicate strict-locator collisions.
scamper.combine: Combine lifecycle and redacted visibility in one compact status line.
scamper.adapt: Adapt existing upload-flow proof copy to compact S028/S029 surfaces.
scamper.modify: Shorten proof surfaces while preserving exact boundary signals.
scamper.put_to_another_use: Use matrix validator output as QA acceptance evidence.
scamper.eliminate: Remove duplicate visible filename claims in detail headings.
scamper.reverse: Treat broad route-smoke failures as external unless target-route smoke reproduces them.

harvard_batna.our_batna: Stop before acceptance and document blocker if any target QA gate fails.
harvard_batna.chosen_path: Fix the real missing boundary text, rerun target gates, and commit the QA report.

mesos_considered.shape: Proof-only report with no product fix
mesos_considered.reason: Would leave a real visibility-boundary regression in the browser flow.

mesos_considered.shape: Patch test expectation to accept weaker copy
mesos_considered.reason: Would mask the redacted visibility gate instead of restoring it.

mesos_considered.shape: Restore exact boundary copy and validate targeted gates
mesos_considered.reason: Smallest honest fix that preserves process proof and no-overclaim semantics.

ethics_and_fairness.exit_or_stop_condition: Any target QA failure would block EPIC-08 acceptance.

learning_log: Compact UI refactors can break exact boundary language even when core behavior still passes.
Broad grep commands are useful for discovery but not suitable as acceptance when they pull unrelated route families.
The matrix must remain stricter than epic-slice acceptance.

final_recommendation.rationale: EPIC-08 target behavior, negative safety and viewport proof passed, while the matrix still prevents unsafe full-domain completion claims.
